name: Pasadena Municipal
description_short: Pasadena Municipal appears to be a government entity rather than a financial services company. The website is the City of Pasadena's official municipal site, not a bank or credit union.
description_long: Pasadena Municipal is listed as a banking institution, but the website evidence indicates this is the official City of Pasadena government website (cityofpasadena.net), not a financial services provider. The site returns a 403 Forbidden access error, preventing verification of any banking services, products, or operations. Based on the domain and URL structure, this appears to be a municipal government portal rather than a licensed bank, credit union, or financial institution. The categorization as 'banking' is likely incorrect, as there is no evidence of deposit accounts, lending products, payment services, or other consumer financial services typically associated with banks or credit unions. Without accessible website content, no specific financial products, rates, terms, or service details can be verified. The 403 error and municipal website structure suggest this entry may be a data error or miscategorization in the CreditDoc system. A legitimate financial institution would have an accessible website with clear product information, regulatory disclosures, and customer service details. The inability to access any meaningful content prevents proper due diligence on whether this entity is even a licensed financial service provider. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
